title: [IOS]Onboarding - Organized page has a continue button
scenario: Navigate to POLY LENS Login screen by tapping Continue on the Organized page after skipping initial screens
steps: Open the app and tap Skip on the initial screens.
Observe the Organized page that appears.
Tap the Continue button on the Organized page.
Observe the next screen that appears.
expected: The Organized page displays a "Continue" button and text about Poly Lens location tracking. Tapping Continue navigates to the POLY LENS Login screen with Login and Continue as Guest options.
